---
title: "Contact"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

## Contact information

**E-mail:** kangminku.kr@gmail.com

**Social:**

- LinkedIn: <https://www.linkedin.com/in/kangminku/>
- Facebook: <https://facebook.com/kaangminku>
- Instagram: <https://instagram.com/kangminku.kr/>

📍 Seoul, Korea

Hello — I am open to collaboration on topics that interest me. Please feel free to reach out anytime at kangminku.kr@gmail.com, and I will get back to you within 24 hours. If you don't hear from me, a message on my phone is always welcome.

## Areas of interest

Public Mental Health, Social Epidemiology, Health Inequalities, Suicide Prevention, Community Health, Workplace Health, Occupational Medicine, Social Determinants of Health, Health Systems and Policies, Social Policy, Preventive Medicine, Lifestyle Medicine, Health Workforce, Urban Planning and Health, Healthy Cities, Pandemic Preparedness, Environmental Health, Global Health, Public Policy, Welfare State, Political Sociology, Rational Choice Institutionalism, Macro-Comparative Research, and Human Rights.
